steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between Recognition and Students Aspire. The notes say both sculptures show African American figures in poses symbolizing supportive relationships.

steps.title: Discard one-sided details
steps.content: A discusses only Students Aspire. C gives completion dates, not a meaningful artistic similarity. D contrasts the figures' features, which is the opposite of the goal. The correct choice names the shared supportive relationship shown in both works. The answer is B.
